title: Tổng Ôn Viết Lại Câu Đồng Nghĩa

knowledge.html:
Tổng Ôn Viết Lại Câu Đồng Nghĩa

Viết lại câu sao cho nghĩa không đổi, sử dụng từ/cụm từ cho sẵn. Bao gồm cả 2 dạng: viết lại câu từ đầu và viết lại câu với từ cho sẵn trong ngoặc.

exercises.original: "Don't forget to lock the door," the mother said to the boy.
exercises.instruction: Rewrite beginning with the words given
exercises.answer: The mother reminded the boy to lock the door.
acceptedAnswers: The mother reminded the boy to lock the door.
The mother reminded the boy to lock the door
The mother reminded the boy not to forget to lock the door.
The mother reminded the boy not to forget to lock the door
exercises.explanation: Câu gốc: Mẹ nói 'Don't forget to lock the door' với bé. Yêu cầu: Chuyển câu nói trực tiếp sang gián tiếp. — Cấu trúc: 'remind someone to V' (nhắc ai làm gì) = 'Don't forget' → 'reminded + O + to V'. | Chuyển câu nói trực tiếp sang gián tiếp: 'Don't forget' → 'reminded + O + to V'. Đáp án: The mother reminded the boy to lock the door.

exercises.original: The mother made the boy tidy up the room.
exercises.instruction: Rewrite beginning with the words given
exercises.answer: The boy was made to tidy up the room by the mother.
acceptedAnswers: The boy was made to tidy up the room by the mother.
The boy was made to tidy up the room.
The boy was made to tidy up the room by his mother.
The boy was made to tidy up the room by his mother
The boy was made to tidy up the room by the mother
The boy was made to tidy up the room
exercises.explanation: Câu gốc: The mother made the boy tidy up the room. Yêu cầu: Viết lại câu bắt đầu 'The boy'. — Cấu trúc: Câu chủ động với 'make someone do' → bị động 'be made to V' (thêm 'to'). | Chuyển chủ động sang bị động của 'make someone do': 'made the boy tidy' → 'was made to tidy'. Đáp án: The boy was made to tidy up the room by the mother.

exercises.original: After he had graduated from university, he went abroad to work.
exercises.instruction: Rewrite beginning with the words given
exercises.answer: Having graduated from university, he went abroad to work.
acceptedAnswers: Having graduated from university, he went abroad to work.
Having graduated from university, he went abroad to work
exercises.explanation: Câu gốc: After he had graduated from university, he went abroad to work. Yêu cầu: Viết lại câu bắt đầu 'Having'. — Cấu trúc: 'After + had + quá khứ phân từ' → 'Having + quá khứ phân từ' (phân từ hoàn thành). | Dùng phân từ hoàn thành 'Having + quá khứ phân từ' thay cho mệnh đề thời gian 'After + had + quá khứ phân từ'. Đáp án: Having graduated from university, he went abroad to work.

exercises.original: Housewives do not have to spend a lot of time doing housework anymore.
exercises.instruction: Rewrite beginning with the words given
exercises.answer: No longer do housewives have to spend a lot of time doing housework.
acceptedAnswers: No longer do housewives have to spend a lot of time doing housework.
No longer do housewives have to spend a lot of time doing housework
exercises.explanation: Câu gốc: Housewives do not have to spend a lot of time doing housework anymore. Yêu cầu: Viết lại câu bắt đầu 'No longer'. — Cấu trúc: 'not...anymore' → 'No longer' đứng đầu + đảo ngữ (trợ động từ + chủ ngữ + động từ). | Dùng 'No longer' + đảo ngữ (trợ động từ + S + V) thay cho 'not...anymore'. Đáp án: No longer do housewives have to spend a lot of time doing housework.

exercises.original: It is said that Galileo invented the telescope.
exercises.instruction: Rewrite beginning with the words given
exercises.answer: Galileo is said to have invented the telescope.
acceptedAnswers: Galileo is said to have invented the telescope.
Galileo is said to have invented the telescope
exercises.explanation: Câu gốc: It is said that Galileo invented the telescope. Yêu cầu: Viết lại câu bắt đầu 'Galileo'. — Cấu trúc: 'It is said that + S + quá khứ' → 'S + is said to have + quá khứ phân từ'. | Chuyển 'It is said that + S + quá khứ' thành 'S + is said to have + quá khứ phân từ'. Đáp án: Galileo is said to have invented the telescope.

exercises.original: The last time I met Mary was three years ago.
exercises.instruction: Rewrite beginning with the words given
exercises.answer: I haven't met Mary for three years.
acceptedAnswers: I haven't met Mary for three years.
I haven't met Mary for three years
I have not met Mary for three years.
I have not met Mary for three years
exercises.explanation: Câu gốc: The last time I met Mary was three years ago. Yêu cầu: Viết lại câu bắt đầu 'I haven't'. — Cấu trúc: 'The last time + quá khứ đơn + was + thời gian + ago' → 'haven't/hasn't + quá khứ phân từ + for + thời gian'. | Chuyển cấu trúc 'The last time + quá khứ + was + thời gian + ago' sang 'haven't + quá khứ phân từ + for + thời gian'. Đáp án: I haven't met Mary for three years.

exercises.original: What does your mother do?
exercises.instruction: Rewrite beginning with the words given
exercises.answer: What is your mother's job?
acceptedAnswers: What is your mother's job?
What is your mother's occupation?
What is your mother's job
exercises.explanation: Câu gốc: What does your mother do? Yêu cầu: Viết lại câu bắt đầu 'What is'. — Cấu trúc: 'What does someone do?' = 'What is someone's job?' (cả hai đều hỏi về nghề nghiệp). | Chuyển 'What does someone do?' thành 'What is someone's job?'. Đáp án: What is your mother's job?

exercises.original: I am not a rich businessman and I can't afford to buy an expensive car.
exercises.instruction: Rewrite beginning with the words given
exercises.answer: If I were a rich businessman, I could afford to buy an expensive car.
acceptedAnswers: If I were a rich businessman, I could afford to buy an expensive car.
If I were a rich businessman, I could afford to buy an expensive car
If I was a rich businessman, I could afford to buy an expensive car.
If I was a rich businessman, I could afford to buy an expensive car
exercises.explanation: Câu gốc: I am not a rich businessman and I can't afford to buy an expensive car. Yêu cầu: Viết lại câu bắt đầu 'If'. — Cấu trúc: Câu điều kiện loại 2 — tình huống không có thật ở hiện tại: 'If + quá khứ (were) + would/could + V nguyên mẫu'. | Dùng câu điều kiện loại 2 cho tình huống không có thật hiện tại. Đáp án: If I were a rich businessman, I could afford to buy an expensive car.

exercises.original: I spent an hour revising what he had already learnt for the test.
exercises.instruction: Rewrite beginning with the words given
exercises.answer: It took me an hour to revise what he had already learnt for the test.
acceptedAnswers: It took me an hour to revise what he had already learnt for the test.
It took me an hour to revise what he had already learnt for the test
exercises.explanation: Câu gốc: I spent an hour revising what he had already learnt for the test. Yêu cầu: Viết lại câu bắt đầu 'It took'. — Cấu trúc: 'S + spent + thời gian + -ing' → 'It took + S + thời gian + to V'. | Chuyển 'S + spent + thời gian + -ing' thành 'It took + S + thời gian + to V'. Đáp án: It took me an hour to revise what he had already learnt for the test.

exercises.original: My father would rather read newspaper than listen to the radio.
exercises.instruction: Rewrite beginning with the words given
exercises.answer: My father prefers reading newspaper to listening to the radio.
acceptedAnswers: My father prefers reading newspaper to listening to the radio.
My father prefers reading newspapers to listening to the radio.
My father prefers reading newspaper to listening to the radio
My father prefers reading the newspaper to listening to the radio.
exercises.explanation: Câu gốc: My father would rather read newspaper than listen to the radio. Yêu cầu: Viết lại câu bắt đầu 'My father prefers'. — Cấu trúc: 'would rather + V1 + than + V2' → 'prefers + -ing + to + -ing'. | Chuyển 'would rather + V + than + V' thành 'prefers + -ing + to + -ing'. Đáp án: My father prefers reading newspaper to listening to the radio.

exercises.original: The old man is working in this company. I love his daughter.
exercises.instruction: Rewrite using the word in brackets: (whose)
exercises.answer: The old man whose daughter I love is working in this company.
acceptedAnswers: The old man whose daughter I love is working in this company.
The old man, whose daughter I love, is working in this company.
exercises.explanation: Câu gốc: The old man is working in this company. I love his daughter. Yêu cầu: Dùng từ cho sẵn 'whose' để nối. — Cấu trúc: Đại từ quan hệ 'whose' chỉ sự sở hữu, đứng sau danh từ chính. | Nối hai câu bằng đại từ quan hệ 'whose' (chỉ sự sở hữu). Đáp án: The old man whose daughter I love is working in this company.

exercises.original: Nam defeated the former champion in three sets. Then he won their inter-school table tennis championship.
exercises.instruction: Rewrite using the word in brackets: (Having)
exercises.answer: Having defeated the former champion in three sets, Nam won their inter-school table tennis championship.
acceptedAnswers: Having defeated the former champion in three sets, Nam won their inter-school table tennis championship.
Having defeated the former champion in three sets, Nam won their inter-school table tennis championship
exercises.explanation: Câu gốc: Nam defeated the former champion in three sets. Then he won their inter-school table tennis championship. Yêu cầu: Dùng 'Having' để nối. — Cấu trúc: 'Having + quá khứ phân từ' (phân từ hoàn thành) nối hai hành động liên tiếp, hành động trước xảy ra trước. | Dùng phân từ hoàn thành 'Having + quá khứ phân từ' để nối hai hành động liên tiếp. Đáp án: Having defeated the former champion in three sets, Nam won their inter-school table tennis championship.

exercises.original: Although she was disabled, she was quite confident the first time she practiced this sport.
exercises.instruction: Rewrite using the word in brackets: (Despite)
exercises.answer: Despite being disabled, she was quite confident the first time she practiced this sport.
acceptedAnswers: Despite being disabled, she was quite confident the first time she practiced this sport.
Despite her disability, she was quite confident the first time she practiced this sport.
exercises.explanation: Câu gốc: Although she was disabled, she was quite confident. Yêu cầu: Dùng 'Despite' để nối. — Cấu trúc: 'Despite + -ing/danh từ' thay cho 'Although + mệnh đề'. | Dùng 'Despite + -ing/danh từ' thay cho 'Although + mệnh đề'. Đáp án: Despite being disabled, she was quite confident the first time she practiced this sport.

exercises.original: Mary doesn't like music. Her brother doesn't either.
exercises.instruction: Rewrite using the word in brackets: (Neither)
exercises.answer: Neither Mary nor her brother likes music.
acceptedAnswers: Neither Mary nor her brother likes music.
Neither Mary nor her brother like music.
exercises.explanation: Câu gốc: Mary doesn't like music. Her brother doesn't either. Yêu cầu: Dùng 'Neither' để nối. — Cấu trúc: 'Neither...nor' nối hai ý phủ định, động từ theo chủ ngữ gần nhất (nearest subject rule). | Dùng 'Neither...nor' để nối hai ý phủ định. Đáp án: Neither Mary nor her brother likes music.

exercises.original: The students will be awarded the present. The students' reports are very valuable.
exercises.instruction: Rewrite using the word in brackets: (whose)
exercises.answer: The students whose reports are very valuable will be awarded the present.
acceptedAnswers: The students whose reports are very valuable will be awarded the present.
The students whose reports are very valuable will be awarded the present
exercises.explanation: Câu gốc: The students will be awarded the present. The students' reports are very valuable. Yêu cầu: Dùng 'whose' để nối. — Cấu trúc: Đại từ quan hệ 'whose' chỉ sự sở hữu, đứng sau danh từ chính. | Nối hai câu bằng đại từ quan hệ 'whose'. Đáp án: The students whose reports are very valuable will be awarded the present.

exercises.original: Jane didn't change her working style. She was sacked.
exercises.instruction: Rewrite using the word in brackets: (If)
exercises.answer: If Jane had changed her working style, she wouldn't have been sacked.
acceptedAnswers: If Jane had changed her working style, she wouldn't have been sacked.
If Jane had changed her working style, she would not have been sacked.
If Jane had changed her working style, she wouldn't have been sacked
If Jane had changed her working style, she would not have been sacked
exercises.explanation: Câu gốc: Jane didn't change her working style. She was sacked. Yêu cầu: Dùng 'If' để viết câu điều kiện. — Cấu trúc: Câu điều kiện loại 3 — tình huống trái với quá khứ: 'If + had + quá khứ phân từ + would have + quá khứ phân từ bị động'. | Dùng câu điều kiện loại 3 cho tình huống trái quá khứ. Đáp án: If Jane had changed her working style, she wouldn't have been sacked.

exercises.original: Hai had all the necessary qualifications for the job. He wasn't offered the job.
exercises.instruction: Rewrite using the word in brackets: (Despite)
exercises.answer: Despite having all the necessary qualifications for the job, Hai wasn't offered the job.
acceptedAnswers: Despite having all the necessary qualifications for the job, Hai wasn't offered the job.
Despite having all the necessary qualifications, Hai wasn't offered the job.
Despite having all the necessary qualifications for the job, Hai was not offered the job.
exercises.explanation: Câu gốc: Hai had all the necessary qualifications for the job. He wasn't offered the job. Yêu cầu: Dùng 'Despite' để nối. — Cấu trúc: 'Despite + -ing/danh từ' thay cho mệnh đề tương phản 'Although/Though + mệnh đề'. | Dùng 'Despite + -ing/danh từ' thay cho mệnh đề tương phản. Đáp án: Despite having all the necessary qualifications for the job, Hai wasn't offered the job.

exercises.original: She closed the door. She wanted to focus on the lesson.
exercises.instruction: Rewrite using the word in brackets: (to)
exercises.answer: She closed the door to focus on the lesson.
acceptedAnswers: She closed the door to focus on the lesson.
She closed the door in order to focus on the lesson.
exercises.explanation: Câu gốc: She closed the door. She wanted to focus on the lesson. Yêu cầu: Dùng 'to' để diễn tả mục đích. — Cấu trúc: 'to V' hoặc 'in order to V' diễn tả mục đích hành động. | Dùng 'to V / in order to V' diễn tả mục đích. Đáp án: She closed the door to focus on the lesson.

exercises.original: He was betrayed by his partner. He suffered huge losses.
exercises.instruction: Rewrite using the word in brackets: (Betrayed)
exercises.answer: Betrayed by his partner, he suffered huge losses.
acceptedAnswers: Betrayed by his partner, he suffered huge losses.
Betrayed by his partner, he suffered huge losses
exercises.explanation: Câu gốc: He was betrayed by his partner. He suffered huge losses. Yêu cầu: Dùng 'Betrayed' để viết lại. — Cấu trúc: Phân từ 2 đặt đầu câu thay cho mệnh đề bị động, chủ ngữ ngầm định giống mệnh đề chính. | Dùng phân từ 2 đặt đầu câu thay cho mệnh đề bị động. Đáp án: Betrayed by his partner, he suffered huge losses.

exercises.original: She doesn't love him. He is sad.
exercises.instruction: Rewrite using the word in brackets: (If)
exercises.answer: If she loved him, he wouldn't be sad.
acceptedAnswers: If she loved him, he wouldn't be sad.
If she loved him, he would not be sad.
If she loved him, he wouldn't be sad
If she loved him, he would not be sad
exercises.explanation: Câu gốc: She doesn't love him. He is sad. Yêu cầu: Dùng 'If' để viết câu điều kiện. — Cấu trúc: Câu điều kiện loại 2 — tình huống không có thật ở hiện tại: 'If + quá khứ (were) + would/could + V nguyên mẫu'. | Dùng câu điều kiện loại 2 cho ước không có thật hiện tại. Đáp án: If she loved him, he wouldn't be sad.
